---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the GIS Dashboard
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Please provide enough detail to understand the issue.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

**Reproducibility**: [ ] Always | [ ] Sometimes | [ ] Once | [ ] Unable to reproduce

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots/Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem.

## 🔧 Environment

Please provide the following information:

- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy S21, Desktop]
- **OS**: [e.g. iOS 15.0, Android 12, Windows 11, macOS 14]
- **OS Version**: [e.g. 15.0.1]
- **App Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Flutter Version**: [e.g. 3.8.1]
- **Dart Version**: [e.g. 3.8.1]
- **Platform**: [ ] Android | [ ] iOS | [ ] Web | [ ] Windows | [ ] Linux | [ ] macOS

## 📝 Logs

```
Paste relevant logs, error messages, or stack traces here
```

## 🔍 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as:
- When did this issue first occur?
- Does it happen on all platforms or just specific ones?
- Are there any workarounds?
- Related issues or pull requests

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided all the information requested above
- [ ] I have tested on the latest version of the app
- [ ] I have checked the troubleshooting guide in the documentation
